tree.name: Alperen Sengun
tree.tradeDescription: Rockets traded a 2025 1st round draft pick (DET own, conditional, became Joan Beringer #17) to Thunder for Alperen Sengun (drafted #16 by OKC). A 2023 conditional 1st (WAS own) was also included but never conveyed.
tree.note: Turkish center, skilled passer and scorer

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#17)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Pick acquired from Pistons in Christian Wood trade (Nov 24, 2020). Did not convey 2021-2024, conveyed in 2025 as #17 overall.
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally conditional 1st from DET; conveyed in 2025 as #17 overall. OKC traded to NYK, then to MIN who selected Beringer.

assetsGivenUp.name: Christian Wood
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets sent Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart, cash and a 2027 2nd round pick (HOU own) to Pistons for Christian Wood, a 2021 2nd round pick (LAL own, Luka Garza) and a conditional 1st round pick (became 2025 #17 Joan Beringer)
assetsGivenUp.note: Power forward; Ariza and Stewart were acquired from Portland in Robert Covington trade 2 days earlier and immediately flipped

assetsGivenUp.name: Trevor Ariza
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Robert Covington to Portland for Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart and a 2021 1st (lottery protected, became Usman Garuba #23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Portland in Robert Covington trade; immediately flipped to DET

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MIN traded Covington to HOU; HOU traded Clint Capela and Nene to ATL; HOU traded Gerald Green and 2020 1st (Zeke Nnaji #22) to DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN in 4-team trade; sent to POR for Ariza, Stewart, and 2021 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: Clint Capela
assetsGivenUp.note: 2014 #25 pick; sent to ATL in 4-team trade for Covington

assetsGivenUp.name: Gerald Green
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#22)
assetsGivenUp.note: HOU own pick; sent to DEN in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Nene
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as FA; sent to ATL in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#16)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Robert Covington to Trail Blazers for Trevor Ariza, the draft rights to Isaiah Stewart (#16) and a 2021 1st round pick (lottery protected, Usman Garuba #23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Stewart drafted by POR Nov 18, traded to HOU Nov 22 in Covington trade, flipped to DET Nov 24

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — full Covington chain tracked under Trevor Ariza node

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Rockets' own 2nd round pick sent to Detroit
